description: Dataset lineage and evidence registry for Namami Gange Priority Locations

datasets.contribution_summary: Verified presence of high-capacity multimodal cargo terminal; contributed 30 points to Infrastructure Score.
Assessed BOD levels (2.1 mg/L) and DO (6.5 mg/L); verified ecological viability with a positive contribution of 25 points.
Confirmed stable riverbed and navigation draft (>3.2m); added 25 points to Navigation Score.
Mapped warehouse access and road-rail proximity; added 12 points to Connectivity.
No active multimodal terminal; local jetties only. Contributed 10 points to Infrastructure Score.
Flagged critical BOD levels (8.4 mg/L); triggered environmental penalty (-20 points).
Flagged shallow lean draft (1.4m) and high siltation risk (82%); reduced Navigation Score by 15 points.
High population and industrial demand mapped; added 18 points to Demand Score.
Established deep-water terminal and port infrastructure verified; contributed 30 points to Infrastructure Score.
Moderate water quality (BOD 2.5 mg/L) verified; contributed 20 points.
Tidal draft support (4.8m+) confirmed; contributed 25 points to Navigation Score.
Excellent multimodal freight corridors mapped; added 16 points to Connectivity.
Active river terminal with jetty infrastructure confirmed; contributed 24 points to Infrastructure Score.
BOD levels adequate (2.8 mg/L) but warning issued on summer coliform; contributed 18 points.
Seasonal flow variability verified with stable draft (2.6m); contributed 20 points.
High urban demand and distribution potential; added 18 points to Demand Score.
Absence of heavy cargo terminals verified; only passenger jetties present. Contributed 8 points.
Acceptable BOD (2.8 mg/L) but religious zone restrictions apply; contributed 15 points.
High seasonal draft volatility and sandbar formation flagged; subtracted 10 points from Navigation Score.
Moderate urban demand driven by pilgrimage traffic; contributed 12 points.
